# ReNova

ReNova is a portfolio-ready second-hand marketplace. It demonstrates public listing discovery, user sign-up and login, seller listing creation, offers, buyer-seller messaging, order state management, reviews, favorites, i18n, and a real Spring Boot REST API.

## Core Pages

- Home: /
- Browse listings: /browse
- Listing detail: /listings/:id
- Post listing: /sell
- Messages: /messages
- Offers: /offers
- Orders: /orders
- Favorites: /favorites
- Profile: /profile/me

## Technical Architecture

- Frontend: Vue 3, Vite, Vue Router, Pinia, Vue I18n, Axios, custom responsive CSS
- Backend: Java 21, Spring Boot 4, Spring Data JPA, Spring Security, JWT, REST JSON APIs
- Database: MySQL at runtime, H2 for tests
- Payments: demo state transitions only; no real card processor is connected

## Useful Documentation

- README.md
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
- docs/API.md
- docs/DEPLOYMENT.md
